name: Mgbochi hypothermia (H -- MACH)
description: Mgbochi hypothermia bụ ihe na-ebute ụzọ na-egbu egbu na trauma. Triad na-egbu egbu: hypothermia + acidosis + coagulopathy. Gbochie na ụgwọ ọ bụla.
equipment: mmiri ọkụ-iv-mmiri-ọ bụrụ na ọ dị
steps: Wepu uwe niile dị mmiri ozugbo enwere ike ime ya.
Jiri akwa mkpuchi okpomọkụ kpuchie onye ọrịa -- akụkụ na-egbuke egbuke IN n'ebe onye ọrịa nọ.
Kechie isi na olu (ebe okpomọkụ dị mkpa).
Mkpuchi si n'ala -- tinye ihe n'etiti onye ọrịa na oyi n'elu ala.
Nyefee mmiri mmiri IV ọkụ ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dị.
Ekwela ka onye ọrịa maa jijiji na-enweghị mkpuchi - ịma jijiji bụ akara ịdọ aka ná ntị mbụ.
Lelee okpomọkụ ma ọ bụrụ na temometa dị. N'okpuru 35°C (95°F) = hypothermia.
warnings: Hypothermia na-akawanye njọ coagulopathy -- ndị ọrịa na-agba ọbara na-ajụ oyi ngwa ngwa ma na-ekekọtakwa nke ọma.
Mgbochi hypothermia ubi ga-amalite n'oge mmerụ ahụ, ọ bụghị na CCP.
